posts.message:
🥚🥚 EGG SALE ALERT! 🥚🥚
Fresh from the farm and ready for your kitchen!
✨ $3 per dozen
✨ BUT — with a $20 meat purchase… only $2 per dozen!
Yes, you read that right! 🙌
Stock up on bacon, chops, sausage, chicken or ground beef and grab farm-fresh eggs for just TWO dollars a dozen!
Breakfast just got a whole lot better 🍳🥓
Message us to order or swing by the farm!
Let’s fill those fridges! 🧺🐓
#RoswellFamilyFarm #FarmFreshEggs #SupportLocal #BreakfastDoneRight

🐷🐔 We talk a LOT about all the animals out in the barn at Roswell Family Farm…
But here’s a fun question for you…
🤔 How many animals do you think live INSIDE our house?! 🏡🐾
Not counting the humans (although some days we act like barn animals 😂).
Drop your guesses below! ⬇️
First to guess might just win some farm bragging rights!
#RoswellFamilyFarm #FarmLife #GuessingGame #FarmFamilyFun

Happy Birthday to our guy — WAYLON! 🎉🚜
This kid truly does it ALL. From chore time at Roswell Family Farm to running from one activity to the next, he shows up ready every single time.

Waylon is proud to be part of Cub Scouts, giving his best on the sports field, and growing in faith at Sunday School. No matter how busy his schedule is, he never complains — he just jumps in and gives it his all.
And at the farm? He’s always the first one ready to help. Feeding animals, hauling buckets, checking fences — you name it. His work ethic, kindness, and big heart make us so proud every day.
Waylon, you are a blessing to our family and this farm. 💙
Help us wish this hardworking birthday boy a big Happy Birthday in the comments! 🎂🐷🐔
#RoswellFamilyFarm #FarmKid #BirthdayBoy
